creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Unfortunately the "ports framework" doesn't appear as a Component option.

The option for listing actual packages "actual-package-depends" in /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk  should be named "actual-package-depends-list" for consistency with the other listing options... or perhaps actual-package-depends-list=actual-package-depends as others may be reliant upon the latter.
